character.description: cute high resolution shop upgrade and prestige perk icons for a cozy slime clicker game

glove1.action: soft mint padded glove icon, rounded mitten silhouette, beginner click upgrade

glove2.action: plush sky blue glove icon, thicker cuff and cushion, intermediate click upgrade

glove3.action: fluffy cloud glove icon, white cloud padding with tiny blue accents, high click upgrade

hand1.action: golden fingertip talisman icon, warm gold shine built into object, click multiplier

hand2.action: diamond fingertip talisman icon, faceted cyan diamond cap, click multiplier

hand3.action: starry fingertip talisman icon, deep indigo and yellow star cap, strongest click multiplier

snack1.action: round cookie snack icon with chocolate chips and slime-green ribbon, production boost

snack2.action: strawberry cake slice icon, pink cream and red strawberry, bigger production boost

snack3.action: cosmic pizza slice icon, purple crust, star toppings, strongest production boost

click1.action: cute cheer baton pointer icon, small wand with foam finger charm, click bonus

click2.action: slime cheer megaphone icon, blue and yellow megaphone with tiny slime face emblem, click bonus

prestige.action: jelly soul blossom icon, translucent pink flower-jelly gem, prestige reset

sticky.action: sticky memory candy icon, glossy wrapped candy with green slime swirl

promise.action: friend promise charm icon, two rounded paw-like hands clasping around a tiny heart

starlight.action: starlight affinity icon, comet star badge with blue trail contained inside the object silhouette

softtime.action: soft time pillow clock icon, sleepy pillow with small clock face and moon accent

combo.action: combo instinct drum icon, tiny festival drum with rhythmic star marks painted on it

evoseed.action: evolution seed icon, glowing green seed sprouting two leaves, progression perk

style: pixel-art-adjacent low-resolution game sprite, compact chibi/mascot-friendly proportions when the base allows it, chunky whole-body silhouette, thick dark 1-2 px outline, visible stepped/pixel edges, limited palette, flat cel shading with at most one small highlight and one shadow step, simple readable face, clear limbs, and no detail that disappears at small runtime size. Avoid polished illustration, painterly rendering, anime key art, 3D render, vector app-icon polish, glossy lighting, soft gradients, anti-aliased high-detail edges, and complex tiny accessories.
